'''Mokk IX''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]] Territories.<ref name="EAOC" /> It was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] labor camp covered in work settlements and wastelands. After stowing away in an Imperial [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]], [[Sish Sadeet]] was left there to die, but rescued by [[Mirith Sinn]] when the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Battle of Mokk IX|liberated]] the world sometime before [[11 ABY/Legends|11 ABY]].<ref name="Handbook" />
